title: digitorebutia haagei var. pectinata

By incorporating this plant into one's lifestyle, individuals can experience improved sleep quality, increased energy levels, and a overall sense of balance and harmony in their lives.

side_effects: Digitorebutia haagei var. pectinata can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, or digestive issues due to its toxic sap. Ingesting the plant's latex can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while skin contact may result in redness, itching, and blistering. Overexposure to the plant's sap can also cause respiratory problems, including coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can lead to more severe health issues, including organ damage and even organ failure.
